notes: Game no longer launches on current patch. Deleting the wine prefix gets it to work up through character creation (because my previous saves will not work, importing them to new prefix causes crash) until it crashes just before any gameplay. A second launch attempt freezes consistently just before the CD Projekt Red logo. No mods. Bummer. I'm done tinkering.

title: Cyberpunk 2077

notes:
I tried running it with Heroic on any Wine or Proton Versions and ran into freezes. Seems to be a problem with Nvidia's driver. On nvidia-535 I got freezes every 2-3 minutes. On 550 it would freeze at the CD Projekt Red startup screen.

I fixed it importing the .exe from Heroic into steam and then forcing Proton 7.06. Now it runs fine and detected the addon too.

Maybe this helps people with Pascal GPU's :)
